description_long: This is a rectangular, dark brown wooden filing cabinet with a flat top surface and three spacious drawers on the front. Each drawer is equipped with two round wooden knobs, making them easy to pull open. The cabinet has a solid, sturdy appearance, with clean lines and a smooth finish that highlights the wood grain. The sides and back are plain, with no visible hardware or decorative elements. The drawers are evenly spaced and appear to be of equal size, suitable for storing documents or office supplies. This piece would fit well in an urban office, garage, or home workspace.
description: A dark brown wooden filing cabinet with three drawers, each featuring round wooden knobs and a smooth, flat top surface.
description_view_0: The back of the cabinet is visible, showing a plain, flat wooden panel with no hardware or features.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the cabinet's depth and the protruding round knobs of the drawers.
description_view_2: The front view displays all three drawers, each with two round wooden knobs, and the flat top surface.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the cabinet's depth and the drawer knobs extending outward.
